channel.title: Hanapha Productivity Tools
channel.description: Free online productivity tools for planning, note-taking, file sharing, task management, resume building, invoicing, and daily workflow organization.

item.title: Clipboard History
item.description: Save and manage clipboard history directly in your browser.

item.title: Cover Letter Generator
item.description: Generate professional cover letters quickly online.

item.title: Daily Planner
item.description: Organize daily schedules, goals, and tasks efficiently.

item.title: Drag Drop File Share
item.description: Share files easily with drag-and-drop functionality online.

item.title: File Link Generator
item.description: Generate direct sharing links for files instantly.

item.title: Habit Tracker
item.description: Track habits and build productive daily routines online.

item.title: Invoice Generator
item.description: Create professional invoices quickly and easily online.

item.title: Kanban Board
item.description: Manage projects and workflows with a digital Kanban board.

item.title: Notes App
item.description: Write, organize, and manage notes directly in your browser.

item.title: Notes Saver
item.description: Save and store notes securely online for quick access.

item.title: Resume Builder
item.description: Build professional resumes and CVs online instantly.

item.title: Temporary File Hosting
item.description: Upload and share files temporarily with secure links.

item.title: To Do List
item.description: Create and manage daily task lists online easily.
